request: The function `approx_token_count` in py/src/lg_orch/memory.py returns 0 for an empty string. Add a guard so that empty input always returns 0 without dividing, and add a check that a single space character returns at least 1. Write the fix and verify it with pytest.
description: Real-world repair benchmark: fix a known edge-case in memory.approx_token_count. Measures whether the agent can (1) locate the function, (2) apply a minimal correct patch, and (3) pass verification in ≤3 loops. Pass rate on this task is the primary outcome quality metric.
acceptance_criteria: all existing memory tests still pass
